config_or_seed_notes: n=22 candidates. Three conditions: score_only / structured (probe-formula feedback) / shuffled (probe-formula feedback with shuffled aspect labels). LEAKAGE supported when structured = shuffled.

equiv_to_gold_rates_derived_from_per_con.note: 20/22 = 0.9091; 12/22 = 0.5455. Derived by counting 'equiv'==true entries in per_condition.

full_numbers.decision_text: No effect: Δ=+0.0000 < 0.05. Probe-formula gain was likely answer-leakage. Per-aspect-actionability claim collapses. STOP and rethink before main run.

notes: HARD RULE 2 says 'structured = shuffled = 90.9%'; this matches the equiv-to-gold rate (20/22 in both conditions). The JSON's primary metric condition_means is the SIV rate (1.0 in both); both are correctly captured here. Δ on either metric = 0.000.
